$deviceId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['id', 'status', 'lastSeen', 'position']) && (newData.child('status').val() == 'online' || newData.child('status').val() == 'offline' || newData.child('status').val() == 'degraded') && newData.child('lastSeen').isNumber() && newData.child('position/lat').isNumber() && newData.child('position/lng').isNumber() && newData.child('position/lat').val() >= -90 && newData.child('position/lat').val() <= 90 && newData.child('position/lng').val() >= -180 && newData.child('position/lng').val() <= 180
